## Goal

_What does success look like in one sentence?_

## Context

_Why is this epic needed? Link any relevant forum posts, proposals, or prior art._

## Scope

_Checklist of deliverables. Link child issues/PRs as they're created._

- [ ] _Deliverable 1 (link to issue)_
- [ ] _Deliverable 2_

## Success Criteria

_How do we know this epic is done? Be specific and measurable._
